overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting exploration of an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The player navigates through interior sanctuaries with hieroglyphic columns and statues, transitions through exterior gardens and columned courtyards, and explores narrow corridors before emerging into a palm-lined courtyard.

events.description: four worshippers kneel in prayer before the large statue, raising hands in reverence
camera pans to reveal adjacent chamber with sphinx statue

agents.ego_description: moving through the temple sanctuary, observing worshippers and architectural details

notable_agents.action: four worshippers kneeling in prayer before the statue, raising hands in unison

burning torches on metal stands providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside an ancient Egyptian temple sanctuary illuminated by torchlight. The camera moves past decorated columns with colorful hieroglyphs toward a massive robed statue on a raised platform. Four worshippers kneel in prayer before the statue, raising their hands in reverence. The stone walls are covered in inscriptions, and the atmosphere is solemn and ceremonial.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden path with cypress trees

events.description: exiting temple interior through massive stone doorway to exterior
entering tree-lined garden path with exterior hieroglyphic walls

agents.ego_description: walking out of the temple sanctuary into the exterior garden area

entered.detail: massive stone doorway with hieroglyphic columns framing the exit to outside
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the garden path
stone walls covered in colorful hieroglyphic reliefs
dirt pathway between planted areas with flowers

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the temple through a massive stone doorway, transitioning from the interior sanctuary to an exterior garden path. Tall cypress trees line the dirt pathway, and the exterior walls are covered in colorful hieroglyphic reliefs. The lighting shifts from torchlight to moonlight as the scene moves outdoors.

approaching two standing figures in the courtyard center

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand courtyard observing the massive architectural columns

notable_agents.action: two figures standing and conversing in the courtyard center near the far temple entrance

entered.detail: enormous decorated columns supporting the temple structure with hieroglyphs
large stone tile flooring in the open courtyard
temple building with large entrance and columns across the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand columned courtyard under the night sky. Massive decorated columns line the paved area, and two figures stand conversing in the center. The camera moves forward through the courtyard toward a distant temple structure with a large entrance, passing the stationary figures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow hieroglyphic corridor with detailed wall carvings

events.description: entering narrow enclosed corridor with hieroglyphic walls
passing wall sconces illuminating the detailed hieroglyphics

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow corridor, examining the detailed hieroglyphic inscriptions on the walls

entered.detail: walls completely covered in detailed hieroglyphic inscriptions and colorful figures
confined stone passage between high walls with detailed carvings

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed corridor with walls completely covered in detailed hieroglyphic inscriptions. The passage is dimly lit by wall sconces that cast flickering light on the colorful carved figures. The camera moves steadily forward through the confined stone passage, examining the intricate ancient artwork.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with palm trees and construction scaffolding

events.description: emerging from corridor into open palm courtyard with construction scaffolding
passing wooden scaffolding structure along the temple wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the palm-lined courtyard, observing the construction scaffolding and architecture

wooden construction scaffolding against the temple wall
open paved area with planted palm trees under night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the narrow corridor into an open courtyard filled with large palm trees in decorative planters. Wooden construction scaffolding stands against the temple wall on the left. The scene is open to the night sky, and the camera moves through the paved area, passing the scaffolding structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the solemn interior of a torchlit sanctuary out into the expansive, moonlit courtyards of an ancient Egyptian temple complex. It begins by gliding past colorful hieroglyphic columns toward a massive robed statue and kneeling worshippers before exiting through a grand stone doorway. As the camera moves outdoors, the warm torchlight shifts to cool moonlight, leading the view along a cypress-lined garden path and into a wide, paved courtyard where figures converse beneath the night sky. The scene then tightens as the camera enters a narrow, dimly lit corridor enclosed by flickering wall sconces and intricate carvings, moving steadily forward through the confined space. Finally, the passage opens up into a spacious courtyard filled with palm trees in decorative planters and wooden construction scaffolding leaning against the temple walls.
